title: poa balbisii var. prorepens
intro: Poa balbisii var. prorepens, also known as creeping meadow-grass or creeping poa, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Poa balbisii var. prorepens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), improve gut health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Poa balbisii var. prorepens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for digestive issues and other health concerns.
